tech_news.title: Xbox CEO Gives A Good Explanation For Why A Console Now Costs $800 - Forbes
tech_news.description: Xbox prices have skyrocketed, but there's a reason for that which is out of Microsoft's control, as the brand's new CEO explains.

tech_news.title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails from Zero - Gematsu
How To Unlock Destiny 2’s Two Secret, Final Endings - Forbes
tech_news.description: Destiny 2 may be ending abruptly, but Bungie has put in two secret endings that you'll have to work to see. And they are worth seeing.

tech_news.description: AI aside, Golden Gate includes a bunch of subtle-but-helpful improvements.

tech_news.title: iFixit Trump phone teardown confirms it’s an HTC dupe - The Verge
tech_news.description: The Trump Mobile T1 Phone’s internals are almost identical to the ‘made in China’ HTC U24 Pro’s, iFixit has confirmed.

tech_news.title: ‘We Wanted To Match the Original and Go Beyond’ – Alien: Isolation 2’s Director on Improving a Survivor Horror Icon - IGN
tech_news.description: Alien: Isolation 2's director discusses the long wait for the sequel, and how the new game needs to "match the original and go beyond".

tech_news.title: Deezer launches an AI music detector for other streaming services - The Verge
tech_news.description: Since the competition won’t buy Deezer’s AI music detection tech, they’re bringing it directly to users.

tech_news.title: Apple’s iPadOS 27 beta downloads briefly included two unsupported iPad Pro models - 9to5Mac
